reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the nationality described for Viken Babikian and Don Manoukian.
2. Compare those descriptions and return whether both people are American.
original_final_question: Are both Viken Babikian and Don Manoukian American? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Compare the supported evidence: Node 1: Viken Babikian: Viken L. Babikian is an American doctor of Armenian origin and professor of neurology at Boston University School of Medicine.; Node 2: Don Manoukian: Donald J. Manoukian (June 9, 1934 – September 23, 2014) was an American football guard and professional wrestler of Armenian descent from Reno, Nevada.. Final answer: yes
